faq.question: <p>How much does a Universal Bulkhead weigh?</p>
<p>Can we add the available options to the Universal Bulkhead?</p>
faq.answer: <p>The available options that can be added to the Universal are the fan kit, vent kit and E or F logistic straps.</p>
faq.catdescription: FAQ for ITW Insulated Products Universal Bulkhead

faq.question: <p>What color does the Universal Bulkhead come in?</p>
faq.answer: <p>The Short version Blue and the Tall version Red with black perimeter gaskets.</p>
faq.catdescription: FAQ for ITW Insulated Products Universal Bulkhead

faq.question: <p>If one side gets damaged do I have to order a complete set?</p>
faq.answer: <p>You can order just one panel not both.</p>
faq.catdescription: FAQ for ITW Insulated Products Universal Bulkhead

faq.question: <p>Is the Universal Bulkhead hinged in the center?</p>
faq.answer: <p>The Universal bulkhead is made up of two panels with a spring top adjustment.</p>

faq.question: <p>What height and width does the Tall version fit?</p>
faq.answer: <p>The Tall universal bulkhead adjust 97” to 106” on the height and the width variance is 88” to 98".</p>
faq.catdescription: FAQ for ITW Insulated Products Universal Bulkhead

faq.question: <p>What height and width does the Short version fit?</p>
faq.answer: <p>The Short universal bulkhead adjust 89” to 98” on the height and the width variance is 88” to 98.</p>
faq.catdescription: FAQ for ITW Insulated Products Universal Bulkhead

faq.question: <p>Does the Universal bulkhead have to be custom made to only my trailer?</p>
faq.answer: <p>The Universal Bulkhead fits virtually every trailer however you will need to decide if you a Short or Tall version accommodates your trailer.</p>
faq.catdescription: FAQ for ITW Insulated Products Universal Bulkhead
